nasb.text: Then the herald loudly proclaimed: “To you the command is given, O peoples, nations and men of every language,

esv.text: And the herald proclaimed aloud, “You are commanded, O peoples, nations, and languages,

cnv.text: 那時，傳令官大聲呼叫說：“各國、各族、說各種語言的人哪！這是傳給你們的命令：

ccb.text: 传令官大声宣布说：“各族、各邦、各语种的人啊，王有令，
